children.text: coordination, implementation, and updating (as appropriate) of the comprehensive health care master plan developed pursuant to ;section 11703 of this title
training for the persons described in ;section 11705(c)(1)(B) of this title
identification of and research into the diseases that are most prevalent among Native Hawaiians, including behavioral, biomedical, epidemiological, and health services;
the development of an action plan outlining the contributions that each member organization of Papa Ola Lokahi will make in carrying out the policy of this chapter;

children.label: A
children.text: the collection and maintenance of data associated with the health status of Native Hawaiians;

children.label: B
children.text: the identification and research into diseases affecting Native Hawaiians; and

children.label: C
children.text: the availability of Native Hawaiian project funds, research projects and publications;
the coordination of the health care programs and services provided to Native Hawaiians; and
the administration of special project funds.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: b Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary for fiscal years 1993 through 2019 to carry out subsection (a).
